Stripping away those 'manufacturing' words used for window dressing and invoicing purposes, the front and back sections of its license are extremely honest: 'industrial design services,' 'industrial internet data services,' 'rail transit communication signal system development.' The diagnostic conclusion is extremely clear: this is fundamentally not an automated machinery manufacturing plant or industrial PC production factory. This is a pure Zero-Employee Automation Software & Trading Shell (micro software outsourcing, IoT data service, and automation solution integration shell company).
